businessQuestion: Which stores have the highest percentage of non-resaleable returned items?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DS.STORE_NAME,
    COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_RETURNS,
    SUM(CASE WHEN FR.IS_RESALEABLE=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NON_RESALEABLE,
    ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN FR.IS_RESALEABLE=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        *100.0/COUNT(*),2
    ) AS NON_RESALEABLE_PCT
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_RETURNS FR
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_STORE DS
ON FR.STORE_KEY=DS.STORE_KEY
GROUP BY DS.STORE_NAME
ORDER BY NON_RESALEABLE_PCT DESC;
businessContext: Operations teams want to reduce inventory loss caused by damaged returns.
